payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany cabinet/sideboard with glossy finish, carved molding and a pair of raised rectangular paneled doors with brass handles and decorative round medallions above; an ornate turned leg is visible at the right — approximate distance ~1.2 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark mahogany cabinet, edge-cropped","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany cabinet/sideboard with glossy finish, carved molding and a pair of raised rectangular paneled doors with brass handles and decorative round medallions above; an ornate turned leg is visible at the right — approximate distance ~1.2 m from camera.","attributes":["dark mahogany wood","glossy polished finish","carved molding","panelled double doors","brass handles","decorative round medallions","ornate turned leg visible","partial/edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
